description: Hand any social video to your AI agent — frames + transcript bundled. MCP server for watch-cli.
name: io.github.sonpiaz/watch-cli

environmentVariables.description: Kyma API key (default backend). Get one at https://kymaapi.com — first $0.50 free, then pay-per-use (~$0.05 per 1-hour video). Optional if WATCH_AUDIO_MODE=local (whisper.cpp) or GROQ_API_KEY is set instead.
environmentVariables.name: KYMA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Groq API key for direct BYOK transcription (alternative to Kyma). Set this instead of KYMA_API_KEY if you prefer direct provider.
environmentVariables.name: GROQ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Backend routing override. Values: kyma (default), byok (use GROQ_API_KEY), local (whisper.cpp on $PATH, fully offline).
environmentVariables.name: WATCH_AUDIO_MODE
